name: Zucchini in Mock Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zucchini into a colander and sprinkle with salt. Place the colander over a pan to collect the juices and let sit for 30-60 minutes.
2. After this period, squeeze the zucchini over the colander to get the last of the juice.
3. Heat some butter in a frying pan and sauté the zucchini and garlic for 2-3 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, heat the zucchini juices to near boiling point.
5. Make a well in the center of the zucchini and heat the butter for a few seconds.
6. Add flour to the well and stir until combined with the butter.
7. After 1 minute, add the hot zucchini juices and stir for 30 seconds to get a thick sauce.
8. Mix everything together and add pepper and cheese (if desired).
